name: @tootallnate/upak
description: Parser for Unreal Engine PAK archives (format v11 / UE 5.x). Decodes the footer, primary index, full directory index, and bit-packed pak-entry records, exposing each inner file as a lazy Blob window. Plaintext + Zlib compression only — no Oodle or AES support yet.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
